title: Recent GOV.UK Speeches on AI in Government

data.title: Commander Strategic Command, General Sir Patrick Sanders’ Speech at the Air and Space Power Conference
data.description: General Sir Patrick Sanders discussed multi-domain integration at this year’s Air and Space Power Conference

data.title: Minister Feryal Clark speech at the Alan Turing Institute’s conference AI UK
data.description: Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State for AI and Digital Government, Feryal Clark, gave a speech at the Alan Turing Institute’s conference AI UK on 17 March 2025.

data.title: UK Co-Sponsored Conference on Holocaust Distortion and Education in Bucharest: Lord Pickles Speech
data.description: International Holocaust Remembrance Alliance Chair Lord Pickles addressed the challenges posed to Holocaust memory by generative AI and other emerging technologies.

data.title: General Sir Jim Hockenhull’s DSEI 2025 Keynote Speech
data.description: General Sir Jim Hockenhull, Commander of Cyber & Specialist Operations Command, delivered his keynote speech at Defence and Security Equipment International (DSEI) 2025.

data.title: Building partnerships to protect the UK from cyber crime
data.description: Security Minister, Dan Jarvis, delivered a speech at the PREDICT 2024 Conference on 22 October.

data.title: Speech by Sir Richard Moore, head of SIS, 19 July 2023
data.description: Sir Richard Moore, head of the Secret Intelligence Service, spoke about the current focus of the Service and the value of the “human factor” in the age of AI.

data.title: Chief of the Defence Staff speech to CSIS
data.description: The Chief of Defence Staff Admiral Sir Tony Radakin gave a speech to the Centre for Strategic and International Studies in Washington

data.title: General Sir Jim Hockenhull, Strategic Command DSEI 2023 Keynote
data.description: General Sir Jim Hockenhull, Commander, Strategic Command, delivered his keynote speech at Defence and Security Equipment International (DSEI) 2023.

data.title: Cyber is a poster child for growth
data.description: The Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster spoke about the cyber threat landscape and how the government is using cyber to drive economic growth in a speech at CyberUK 2025 in Manchester.

data.title: Speech at DSEI by Deputy Chief of the General Staff
data.description: Speech at DSEI by Deputy Chief of the General Staff, Lieutenant General David Eastman MBE, about the British Army’s place in an increasingly dangerous world.

data.title: Minister Stephanie Peacock's speech at the G20 Culture Ministerial meeting
data.description: Minister Stephanie Peacock represented the UK at the meeting of G20 Culture Ministers in South Africa

data.title: Speech by Sir Richard Moore, Chief of SIS, 19 September 2025
data.description: Sir Richard Moore, Chief of the Secret Intelligence Service, spoke about the launch of a new dark web portal to recruit spies for the UK.

data.title: Prime Minister's remarks on the NHS: 6 January 2025
data.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer's remarks on the NHS at the South West London Elective Orthopaedic Centre in Epsom.

data.title: Speech by Blaise Metreweli, Chief of SIS, 15 December 2025
data.description: Blaise Metreweli, Chief of the Secret Intelligence Service on how SIS is keeping the UK safe in a world where the rules of conflict are being rewritten.

data.title: Remarks made by Technology Secretary Peter Kyle at the Munich Security Conference
data.description: Technology Secretary Peter Kyle spoke about the the UK’s approach to the responsible development of artificial intelligence at the Munich Security Conference.
